response.overview: A lively Igbo village romantic comedy-drama that followed three close friends Nneka, Ogechi, and Oluchi, who's dreams were getting married to a rich husband and escaping their village traumas. Their fantasies seem to come true when Martins, a charming,flashy contractor arrives to build a community hall. Handsomely and smooth-talking he secretly began to date the ladies, deceitfully Martins promises the ladies marriage enslaving them upon a dream that will never come, but hell break loose we the ladies noticed what was going on right beneath their nose and the reverse became the case.
response.title: Contract Love Wahala
